z.object({ "allOf": z.intersection(z.boolean(), z.intersection(z.number(), z.string())).optional(), "anyOf": z.union([z.boolean(), z.number(), z.string()]).optional(), "oneOf": z.any().superRefine((x, ctx) => {
    const schemas = [z.boolean(), z.number(), z.string()];
    const { errors, failed } = schemas.reduce<{
      errors: z.ZodError[];
      failed: number;
    }>(
      ({ errors, failed }, schema) =>
        ((result) =>
          result.error
            ? {
                errors: [...errors, result.error],
                failed: failed + 1,
              }
            : { errors, failed })(
          schema.safeParse(x),
        ),
      { errors: [], failed: 0 },
    );
    const passed = schemas.length - failed;
    if (passed !== 1) {
      ctx.addIssue(errors.length ? {
        path: ctx.path,
        code: "invalid_union",
        unionErrors: errors,
        message: "Invalid input: Should pass single schema. Passed " + passed,
      } : {
        path: ctx.path,
        code: "custom",
        message: "Invalid input: Should pass single schema. Passed " + passed,
      });
    }
  }).optional(), "array": z.array(z.string()).min(2).max(3).optional(), "tuple": z.tuple([z.boolean(),z.number(),z.string()]).optional(), "const": z.literal("xbox").optional(), "enum": z.enum(["ps4","ps5"]).optional(), "ifThenElse": z.union([z.literal("x"), z.union([z.literal(1), z.literal(2), z.literal(3)])]).superRefine((value,ctx) => {
  const result = z.string().safeParse(value).success
    ? z.literal("x").safeParse(value)
    : z.union([z.literal(1), z.literal(2), z.literal(3)]).safeParse(value);
  if (!result.success) {
    result.error.errors.forEach((error) => ctx.addIssue(error))
  }
}).optional(), "null": z.null().optional(), "multiple": z.union([z.array(z.any()), z.boolean()]).optional(), "objAdditionalTrue": z.object({ "x": z.string().optional() }).catchall(z.any()).optional(), "objAdditionalFalse": z.object({ "x": z.string().optional() }).strict().optional(), "objAdditionalNumber": z.object({ "x": z.string().optional() }).catchall(z.number()).optional(), "objAdditionalOnly": z.record(z.number()).optional(), "patternProps": z.object({ "z": z.string().optional() }).catchall(z.union([z.string(), z.number(), z.never()])).superRefine((value, ctx) => {
for (const key in value) {
let evaluated = ["z"].includes(key)
if (key.match(new RegExp("^x"))) {
evaluated = true
const result = z.string().safeParse(value[key])
if (!result.success) {
ctx.addIssue({
          path: [...ctx.path, key],
          code: 'custom',
          message: `Invalid input: Key matching regex /${key}/ must match schema`,
          params: {
            issues: result.error.issues
          }
        })
}
}
if (key.match(new RegExp("^y"))) {
evaluated = true
const result = z.number().safeParse(value[key])
if (!result.success) {
ctx.addIssue({
          path: [...ctx.path, key],
          code: 'custom',
          message: `Invalid input: Key matching regex /${key}/ must match schema`,
          params: {
            issues: result.error.issues
          }
        })
}
}
if (!evaluated) {
const result = z.never().safeParse(value[key])
if (!result.success) {
ctx.addIssue({
          path: [...ctx.path, key],
          code: 'custom',
          message: `Invalid input: must match catchall schema`,
          params: {
            issues: result.error.issues
          }
        })
}
}
}
}).optional() })
